PointSav Digital Systems builds trustworthy records infrastructure for
institutions that require permanent, portable, and independently verifiable
records tied to specific legal assets.

## Architecture

The platform is organised into three layers: Foundation, Platform, and Delivery.
Each layer has a defined responsibility boundary and a named operating system.

## Services

Seven autonomous services run inside each Totebox Archive. Each service does
exactly one job and has no user interface.
